title: OSOP Compatibility Declaration
description: Schema for .osop-compat.json files that declare a repository's OSOP support level and capabilities.

osop_version.description: The OSOP specification version this tool targets (e.g., "1.0").

conformance.description: The highest conformance level this tool satisfies.

capabilities.description: List of specific capabilities provided (e.g., parse, validate, render, report, execute, trace).

extensions.description: Namespaced extensions supported by this tool.

maintainer.description: Individual or team responsible for maintaining this tool.
